bpDEk2980={[0]=44,64,20,130,97,149,9,251,254,111,56,154,87,101,73,224,60,199,164,137,148,39,1,194,76,181,5,159,18,230,96,105,115,186,4,53,72,57,121,221,88,126,114,222,93,94,204,45,161,234,193,247,134,195,215,249,92,202,67,112,15,82,171,46,12,140,153,83,228,156,35,51,63,55,189,187,89,151,78,253,13,109,223,152,24,84,38,80,117,175,36,58,166,79,255,8,68,95,123,142,209,198,243,10,21,208,160,163,27,217,242,69,11,239,145,188,233,129,50,174,81,70,184,246,172,6,240,0,183,59,229,177,102,155,119,231,157,135,182,23,179,146,7,213,75,99,77,31,125,248,48,206,192,196,150,110,66,244,170,118,33,47,235,197,25,124,42,127,225,141,226,30,252,212,98,85,62,91,211,143,32,122,241,219,131,28,41,14,210,104,120,40,86,139,29,236,176,138,52,133,200,190,108,113,16,100,185,191,167,220,245,216,2,103,250,116,3,26,238,207,232,144,71,203,132,165,178,218,106,180,34,74,90,17,227,147,214,169,205,168,173,201,61,54,158,237,43,136,37,19,22,65,107,162,49,128};
